**Executive Summary**: The Boston Red Sox organization is reflecting on their season after manager Alex Cora expressed his disappointment in an email to the entire team for not finishing the job.

## Context / Background
The Red Sox had a promising season, but ultimately fell short of their goals. Alex Cora's email to the team highlighted his disappointment and encouraged the players to learn from their mistakes.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Category | Stat |
| --- | --- |
| Wins | 80 |
| Losses | 82 |
| Home Runs | 200 |

> 'Disappointed we didn’t finish the job' - Alex Cora

## What's Next?
The Red Sox will look to regroup and come back stronger next season. With a talented roster and experienced management, they are poised to make a deep playoff run.
